name: testGetWaitEventEnvVarData
title: testGetWaitEventEnvVarData
syntax: long testGetWaitEventEnvVarData(dword index, float & value); // form 1
description: Retrieves the environment variable value that has led to the resume of a joined wait statement.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The variable will be filled with the current value of the environment variable value.
